vectors.description: Complete bounded purchase with matching payment evidence.
Declared total differs from exact arithmetic result.
Purchase remains complete while payment evidence is absent.
Independent payment amount does not match the declaration.
Independent payment currency does not match the declaration.
A linked partial return preserves the original receipt identity.
The bounded lineage state resolves a full return.
Compatible return and refund events reconcile.
Refunded amount exceeds supported returned amount.

Accounting resolution remains proposal-only and carries no execution authority.
A wrapped source preserves transformation provenance without assuming equivalence.

Duplicate lineage event identities are rejected as replay conflict.
